title: Alex's Caves - Legendary Tremorzilla Skin
description: A Black and Blue retexture for Alex's caves Tremorzilla Retro variant
body:
![Legendary Colors Tremorzilla](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee5548955719309b87cc6c547a76ef26b86e8e01.png)

This is a simple Texture Pack that changes the look of one of Alex's caves mobs, The King of the Monsters "Tremorzilla" 

The Texture pack changes the Retro variant and not the original, Use an amber curiosity on a Regular Tremorzilla to get this skin.
